name: NetSuite
description: Connects to Oracle NetSuite via the SuiteTalk REST API using Token-Based Authentication (OAuth 1.0a with HMAC-SHA256). Syncs customers, invoices, and items into the Shielva knowledge base and exposes SuiteQL for advanced queries.

install_fields.label: Account ID
install_fields.help: Your NetSuite account ID. Find it under Setup > Company > Company Information > NetSuite Account ID. For sandbox accounts append _SB1 (e.g. 1234567_SB1).

install_fields.label: Consumer Key
install_fields.help: The Consumer Key generated when you created your Integration record in NetSuite (Setup > Integration > Integration Management).

install_fields.label: Consumer Secret
install_fields.help: The Consumer Secret from your NetSuite Integration record. Shown only once at creation — store it securely.

install_fields.label: Token Key
install_fields.help: The Token ID generated under Setup > Users/Roles > Access Tokens > New or via the User Provisioning page.

install_fields.label: Token Secret
install_fields.help: The Token Secret corresponding to your Token ID. Shown only once at creation.

methods.name: Install / Validate Credentials
methods.description: Validates all five TBA fields are present, then verifies them by calling GET /record/v1/customer?limit=1 against the NetSuite REST API.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Verifies connectivity and credential validity by calling GET /record/v1/customer?limit=1. Returns HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Full Sync
methods.description: Fetches customers, invoices, and items from NetSuite (up to 100 each) and normalizes them into ConnectorDocuments for the Shielva knowledge base.

methods.name: List Customers
methods.description: Paginated list of NetSuite customer records.

methods.name: Get Customer
methods.description: Retrieve a single NetSuite customer by internal ID.

methods.name: List Invoices
methods.description: Paginated list of NetSuite invoice records.

methods.name: Get Invoice
methods.description: Retrieve a single NetSuite invoice by internal ID.

methods.name: List Items
methods.description: Paginated list of NetSuite item records.

methods.name: SuiteQL Query
methods.description: Execute an arbitrary SuiteQL query against the NetSuite query engine. SuiteQL is NetSuite's SQL-like language for cross-record queries including custom fields and joins.

apis.name: Install / Validate Credentials
apis.description: Validate all five TBA install fields and verify connectivity.

apis.name: Full Sync
apis.description: Sync NetSuite customers, invoices, and items into the knowledge base.

apis.name: Get Customer
apis.description: GET /record/v1/customer/{customer_id} — single customer by internal ID.

apis.name: Get Invoice
apis.description: GET /record/v1/invoice/{invoice_id} — single invoice by internal ID.
